{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01Ly3hLxw5qm4TcUY43pjjBB","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HWhXzmFNVs3ersUyr5YSGv","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\n\ndef biz_hours(start, end):\n    \"\"\"Vectorized business hours (9-17 UTC, Mon-Fri) between two datetime series.\"\"\"\n    s = start.copy(); e = end.copy()\n    out = np.zeros(len(s))\n    # iterate days is too slow? ~15k rows, max span ~772h ~ 33 days, fine with per-row loop via numpy days\n    bd = np.busday_count(s.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'), e.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'))\n    def clamp(ts):\n        h = ts.dt.hour + ts.dt.minute/60 + ts.dt.second/3600\n        return h.clip(9, 17)\n    sh = clamp(s); eh = clamp(e)\n    sw = np.is_busday(s.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'))\n    ew = np.is_busday(e.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'))\n    same_day = (s.dt.date == e.dt.date).values\n    # same business day\n    out = np.where(same_day & sw, (eh - sh).clip(lower=0), 0.0)\n    # different days: full days between + tail of start day + head of end day\n    diff = ~same_day\n    start_part = np.where(sw, (17 - sh).clip(lower=0), 0.0)\n    end_part = np.where(ew, (eh - 9).clip(lower=0), 0.0)\n    full_days = np.maximum(bd - sw.astype(int), 0)  # busdays strictly between\n    out = np.where(diff, start_part + end_part + full_days*8, out)\n    return out\n\nta = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('task_assignment_00*.csv'))])\nfor c in ['assigned_at','unassigned_at']:\n    ta[c] = pd.to_datetime(ta[c])\nta['bh'] = biz_hours(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)\n\nprint(ta.groupby('assignment_role')['bh'].describe()[['count','25%','50%','75%','90%' if False else 'max']].round(2))\n\n# log-scale robust z per role\nta['logbh'] = np.log1p(ta['bh'])\ng = ta.groupby('assignment_role')['logbh']\nta['z'] = (ta['logbh'] - g.transform('median')) / (g.transform(lambda x: (x.quantile(.75)-x.quantile(.25))/1.349) + 1e-9)\n\nagg = ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('z','size'), medz=('z','median'), meanz=('z','mean'))\nagg = agg.sort_values('medz', ascending=False)\nprint(agg.head(30))\nprint(\"...\")\nprint(agg['medz'].describe())\nta.to_pickle('/tmp/ta.pkl')\nagg.to_pickle('/tmp/agg.pkl')\nEOF","description":"Compute business-hours durations and per-employee z-scores"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1503,"cache_read_input_tokens":26046,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1503,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":41,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef65439c-1152-4ce9-9c83-39dbc8928dbd","uuid":"851b3769-be85-4ced-ac8b-055e8bdbf98a","request_id":"req_011CbwPH9tjq4oycj3ieCAEA"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01Ts7Qj5143CLEmTTgxtjZ99","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Ds2JtyHbXE4sqm5zytHky6","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np\n\nta = pd.read_pickle('/tmp/ta.pkl')\n\n# Pickup delay: gap between previous assignment's end and this assignment's start within a task\nta = ta.sort_values(['task_id','assigned_at'])\nta['prev_end'] = ta.groupby('task_id')['unassigned_at'].shift(1)\n# cumulative max to handle overlapping/parallel stages\nta['prev_end'] = ta.groupby('task_id')['prev_end'].cummax()\n\ndef biz_hours(start, end):\n    valid = start.notna() & end.notna() & (end >= start)\n    s = start.where(valid, pd.Timestamp('2024-01-01')); e = end.where(valid, pd.Timestamp('2024-01-01'))\n    bd = np.busday_count(s.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'), e.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'))\n    def clamp(ts):\n        h = ts.dt.hour + ts.dt.minute/60 + ts.dt.second/3600\n        return h.clip(9, 17)\n    sh, eh = clamp(s), clamp(e)\n    sw = np.is_busday(s.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'))\n    ew = np.is_busday(e.dt.date.values.astype('datetime64[D]'))\n    same = (s.dt.date == e.dt.date).values\n    out = np.where(same & sw, (eh-sh).clip(lower=0), 0.0)\n    start_part = np.where(sw, (17-sh).clip(lower=0), 0.0)\n    end_part = np.where(ew, (eh-9).clip(lower=0), 0.0)\n    full = np.maximum(bd - sw.astype(int), 0)\n    out = np.where(~same, start_part+end_part+full*8, out)\n    return np.where(valid, out, np.nan)\n\nta['pickup_bh'] = biz_hours(ta['prev_end'], ta['assigned_at'])\nta['logpu'] = np.log1p(ta['pickup_bh'])\ng = ta.groupby('assignment_role')['logpu']\nta['zpu'] = (ta['logpu'] - g.transform('median')) / (g.transform(lambda x: (x.quantile(.75)-x.quantile(.25))/1.349)+1e-9)\n\nagg = ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(\n    n=('z','size'), medz=('z','median'),\n    n_pu=('zpu','count'), medzpu=('zpu','median'),\n    frac_slow=('z', lambda x:(x>2).mean()),\n    frac_slow_pu=('zpu', lambda x:(x>2).mean()),\n)\nagg['combo'] = agg[['medz','medzpu']].max(axis=1)\nprint(agg.sort_values('combo', ascending=False).head(35).round(3))\nprint()\nprint(\"pickup median by role:\")\nprint(ta.groupby('assignment_role')['pickup_bh'].median().round(2))\nta.to_pickle('/tmp/ta2.pkl')\nEOF","description":"Compute pickup-delay z-scores per employee"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2495,"cache_read_input_tokens":27549,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2495,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":40,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef65439c-1152-4ce9-9c83-39dbc8928dbd","uuid":"7710f63a-042d-41bf-a4e1-9d9dab9f17c7","request_id":"req_011CbwPKChxjbNoMBn6teYFu"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_014fKcH3NcgzCW28CwxKFUfM","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015yw6jY5UADVtCYgRQXtKcQ","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\n\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\nmt = pd.read_csv('meeting_001.csv'); mp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('meeting_participant_00*.csv'))])\nmsg = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('message_metadata_00*.csv'))])\nmt['start_time']=pd.to_datetime(mt['start_time']); mt['end_time']=pd.to_datetime(mt['end_time'])\nmt['dur']= (mt.end_time-mt.start_time).dt.total_seconds()/3600\n\nm = mp.merge(mt, on='meeting_id')\nmeet_h = m.groupby('employee_id')['dur'].sum().rename('meeting_h')\nmeet_n = m.groupby('employee_id').size().rename('meeting_n')\nsent = msg.groupby('sender_id').size().rename('sent')\nrecv = msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().rename('recv')\n\nta = pd.read_pickle('/tmp/ta2.pkl')\nn_assign = ta.groupby('employee_id').size().rename('n_assign')\n# total busy business hours on assignments\nbusy = ta.groupby('employee_id')['bh'].sum().rename('busy_bh')\n\nov = pd.concat([meet_h, meet_n, sent, recv, n_assign, busy], axis=1).fillna(0)\nov = ov.join(emp.set_index('employee_id')[['role','seniority_level']])\n\ncand_slow=[222,123,281,282]; cand_pu=[325,228,26,45,302,81,74,204]\nov['flag'] = np.where(ov.index.isin(cand_slow),'SLOW',np.where(ov.index.isin(cand_pu),'PICKUP',''))\n\n# z within seniority (meetings vary by seniority by design)\nfor col in ['meeting_h','sent','recv','n_assign','busy_bh']:\n    g = ov.groupby('seniority_level')[col]\n    ov['z_'+col] = (ov[col]-g.transform('mean'))/g.transform('std')\n\nprint(ov[ov.flag!=''].round(2).to_string())\nprint()\nprint(\"Top by z_meeting_h:\"); print(ov.sort_values('z_meeting_h',ascending=False).head(12)[['role','seniority_level','meeting_h','z_meeting_h','flag']].round(2))\nprint()\nprint(\"Top by combined overload (z_meeting+z_recv+z_n_assign):\")\nov['ovl']=ov[['z_meeting_h','z_recv','z_n_assign']].sum(axis=1)\nprint(ov.sort_values('ovl',ascending=False).head(15)[['role','seniority_level','meeting_h','recv','n_assign','ovl','flag']].round(2))\nEOF","description":"Check overload signals for candidate employees"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":33319,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef65439c-1152-4ce9-9c83-39dbc8928dbd","uuid":"11e2d4a7-1b3f-41b0-8b9f-d80e73dae402","request_id":"req_011CbwPMZEoBKejMdAKpEvsX"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01K7JMDbpYxhesWBio99tLbP","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_016qFyGjYR31D3MhVsy19TtC","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom scipy.stats import mannwhitneyu\n\nta = pd.read_pickle('/tmp/ta2.pkl')\n\n# per (employee, role) median z, n>=6 — catch role-specific slowness diluted by global median\ner = ta.groupby(['employee_id','assignment_role']).agg(n=('z','size'), medz=('z','median'), medzpu=('zpu','median'))\ner = er[er.n>=6]\ntop_exec = er[er.medz>1.5].sort_values('medz',ascending=False)\ntop_pu = er[er.medzpu>1.8].sort_values('medzpu',ascending=False)\nprint(\"Role-specific slow execution (medz>1.5, n>=6):\"); print(top_exec.round(2))\nprint(\"\\nRole-specific slow pickup (medzpu>1.8, n>=6):\"); print(top_pu.round(2).head(25))\n\n# significance test for borderline employees vs everyone else, on z and zpu\ncands = [222,123,281,282,325,228,26,45,302,81,74,204]\nfor e in [220,301,259,52,99,235,11,179,50]:\n    x = ta.loc[ta.employee_id==e]\n    rest = ta.loc[~ta.employee_id.isin(cands+[e])]\n    pz = mannwhitneyu(x['z'].dropna(), rest['z'].dropna(), alternative='greater').pvalue\n    xp = x['zpu'].dropna()\n    ppu = mannwhitneyu(xp, rest['zpu'].dropna(), alternative='greater').pvalue if len(xp)>3 else np.nan\n    print(f\"emp {e}: n={len(x)} medz={x['z'].median():.2f} p_exec={pz:.1e} medzpu={x['zpu'].median():.2f} p_pickup={ppu:.1e}\")\nEOF","description":"Check role-specific slowness and borderline significance"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3804,"cache_read_input_tokens":33319,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3804,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":30,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef65439c-1152-4ce9-9c83-39dbc8928dbd","uuid":"edebbb03-6825-498f-803f-b5a913863e79","request_id":"req_011CbwPQGKeFFk94T193kwze"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_011SRKz7LJVuczFZGtSTUNNT","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JcNcA1XY4jeaXdHypKuFEp","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\n\nta = pd.read_pickle('/tmp/ta2.pkl')\nemp = pd.read_csv('employee_001.csv')\nmsg = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('message_metadata_00*.csv'))])\nmt = pd.read_csv('meeting_001.csv'); mp = pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob('meeting_participant_00*.csv'))])\nmt['dur']=(pd.to_datetime(mt.end_time)-pd.to_datetime(mt.start_time)).dt.total_seconds()/3600\nmeet_h = mp.merge(mt,on='meeting_id').groupby('employee_id')['dur'].sum()\n\ncheck = [276,23,285,102,196,190,22,288,149,220]\nagg = ta[ta.employee_id.isin(check)].groupby('employee_id').agg(\n    n=('z','size'), medz=('z','median'), n_pu=('zpu','count'), medzpu=('zpu','median'),\n    frac_pu_slow=('zpu', lambda x: (x.dropna()>2).mean()))\nagg['recv'] = msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().reindex(check)\nagg['sent'] = msg.groupby('sender_id').size().reindex(check)\nagg['meet_h'] = meet_h.reindex(check).fillna(0)\nagg = agg.join(emp.set_index('employee_id')['seniority_level'])\nprint(agg.round(2))\nprint(\"\\nbaseline: recv/sent medians:\", msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().median(), msg.groupby('sender_id').size().median(),\n      \"meet_h median:\", meet_h.median().round(1))\n\n# final ranked list, n>=10, by max(medz, medzpu)\ng = ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('z','size'), medz=('z','median'), n_pu=('zpu','count'), medzpu=('zpu','median'))\ng = g[(g.n>=10)]\ng['score'] = g[['medz','medzpu']].max(axis=1)\nprint(\"\\nFinal ranking (n>=10):\")\nprint(g.sort_values('score',ascending=False).head(16).round(2))\nEOF","description":"Validate that single-role outliers are noise, finalize ranking"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2951,"cache_read_input_tokens":37123,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2951,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef65439c-1152-4ce9-9c83-39dbc8928dbd","uuid":"50eb6817-c4e6-4e3c-a6d9-24352a48a091","request_id":"req_011CbwPSdQD84mDJCfq84EFH"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01Ut9x41U5fwYMhqdrZmQvXf","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Done — `/app/answer.json` contains 12 bottleneck employees: **26, 45, 74, 81, 123, 204, 222, 228, 281, 282, 302, 325**.\n\n## How I found them\n\nI merged all task assignments (15,098 rows) and computed two business-hours-adjusted latency metrics per assignment (counting only 9:00–17:00 UTC on weekdays), each normalized as a robust z-score against peers doing the same assignment role:\n\n1. **Execution time** — how long the employee held the assignment (assigned → unassigned).\n2. **Pickup delay** — how long the task sat in queue between the previous pipeline stage finishing and this employee starting.\n\nTaking each employee's median z-score across all their assignments produced two cleanly separated outlier groups, with a large gap to everyone else (next-best employee scored 1.1 vs 2.2+ for all flagged ones):\n\n**Poor performers (slow execution, z = 4.1–6.5; 83–100% of their assignments slow):**\n- **222, 123** — normal meeting/message load but extreme time-on-task; pure performance problems. Employee 123 was slow across every role they touched (testing, implementing, owning, reviewing).\n- **281, 282** (security/platform managers) — slow at executing *and* slow at picking up approvals and deployments, blocking everything routed through them.\n\n**Overloaded (slow pickup, z = 2.2–3.3; 40–77% of pickups delayed):**\n- **26, 45, 74, 81, 204, 228, 302, 325** — execute at normal speed once started, but tasks wait in their queue far longer than for peers in the same roles. Their overload is independently confirmed: all have message volumes 3–6 standard deviations above their seniority peers, and several have extreme meeting loads (228: 170h in meetings vs a 23h median; 302: 106h; 74 and 204: 73h each).\n\nI also ruled out look-alikes: employees with heavy meeting load but no delays (e.g., 317, 205), statistically-slower-but-mild employees far below the gap (220, 52, 99), and single-role small-sample outliers whose global behavior was normal (276, 23, 285, 102)."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":558,"cache_read_input_tokens":43322,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":558,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef65439c-1152-4ce9-9c83-39dbc8928dbd","uuid":"e3673abf-a60a-4e99-bd72-deb7d9464167","request_id":"req_011CbwPW8RoKdzSGSLpsq1bP"}

Employee 123 was slow across every role they touched (testing, implementing, owning, reviewing).\n- **281, 282** (security/platform managers) — slow at executing *and* slow at picking up approvals and deployments, blocking everything routed through them.\n\n**Overloaded (slow pickup, z = 2.2–3.3; 40–77% of pickups delayed):**\n- **26, 45, 74, 81, 204, 228, 302, 325** — execute at normal speed once started, but tasks wait in their queue far longer than for peers in the same roles.
